title: grewia sely
intro: Grewia sely, also known as the Sely's false mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and fruits have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Grewia sely include tea and infusion, which can be prepared by boiling the leaves in water or using the plant's extract in capsule or powder form.
